title: On Fanny Godwin.
content:
Her voice did quiver as we parted,
    Yet knew I not that heart was broken
    From which it came, and I departed
    Heeding not the words then spoken.
    Misery - O Misery,
    This world is all too wide for thee.
meaning:
Percy Bysshe Shelley's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On Fanny Godwin."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
